overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos exploring a surreal cosmic realm with floating asteroids and vibrant nebula skies in purple, orange, and blue hues. The character walks across rocky alien terrain through a fantastical dimensional space, eventually encountering a companion character.

scene_state.functional_zone: cosmic rocky canyon with floating debris

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily through the rocky cosmic terrain with the Leviathan Axe strapped to his back, approaching a large rock arch formation

entered.detail: large floating rock formation forming a natural archway with glowing purple highlights
vibrant purple and blue cosmic clouds filling the sky with swirling patterns
scattered floating rocks and debris suspended in the air
weathered stone ruins and rock outcroppings lining the path
tall vertical beam of white-blue cosmic light visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through a surreal cosmic canyon surrounded by ancient stone walls and floating asteroids. The environment is bathed in purple neon light from the nebula sky above, with a mysterious blue beam visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cosmic overlook with orange nebula vortex

events.description: scene lighting shifts from purple-dominant to warm orange as the camera turns toward a massive cosmic vortex
character turns right to face the orange nebula while continuing to walk along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking along the cliff edge toward a massive orange cosmic cloud formation, navigating the uneven rocky path

entered.detail: massive swirling cloud formation in vibrant orange and red hues resembling a cosmic storm
narrow rocky pathway winding along the edge of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dramatic overlook where a massive orange cosmic vortex dominates the right side of the sky. Kratos walks along a narrow stone path at the cliff's edge as the lighting shifts from purple to warm orange tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: cosmic vista with towering light beam and floating asteroids

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the full scale of the blue cosmic beam and star-filled nebula sky
companion character appears in the distance, standing on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Kratos pausing to look up at the cosmic sky, then turning and walking toward a companion character in the distance

notable_agents.action: companion character standing on the path, then walking alongside Kratos toward the crystal formations

entered.detail: glowing purple crystalline structures embedded in the rock face

segments.scene_description: The camera pans up to reveal a breathtaking cosmic sky filled with swirling blue and purple nebulae around a towering light beam. Kratos then turns to walk toward a companion character standing ahead, with glowing purple crystal formations visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a surreal cosmic canyon that gradually opens into a breathtaking celestial overlook. It begins with Kratos walking through ancient stone walls and floating asteroids bathed in purple neon light, with a mysterious blue beam shimmering in the far distance. As the path leads to a dramatic cliff's edge, the lighting shifts from purple to warm orange tones, dominated by a massive cosmic vortex swirling in the sky. The scene then expands as the camera pans upward to reveal towering light beams and swirling blue and purple nebulae before turning back toward Kratos. Finally, he walks past glowing purple crystal formations toward a companion character standing ahead in the vast dimensional space.
